description: SPEC §7.4 half-push recovery for bl sync: detect ledger-ahead-of-main state, retry or roll back, surface clearly. Also bring test coverage back to 100% on all new modules (task_io, store_init, git_state, sync), ensure no file exceeds 300 lines, general cleanup/simplify. Does NOT include delivery-tag resolution (§6) - that's a separate task.
title: Sync half-push recovery + coverage + cleanup
